sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_configurations (id INTEGER, setting_name VARCHAR, setting_value VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_configurations (id, setting_name, setting_value) VALUES (1, 'access_mode', current_setting('access_mode'));
UPDATE test_configurations SET setting_value = current_setting('search_path') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, setting_name, setting_value FROM test_configurations WHERE setting_name = 'access_mode';
DELETE FROM test_configurations WHERE setting_name = 'access_mode' AND setting_value = current_setting('access_mode');
